## AlphaDesk {{tag}}

Professional AI multi-market stock research desktop workspace.

### Install

| Platform | Download |
|----------|----------|
| macOS (Apple Silicon) | `AlphaDesk_*_aarch64.dmg` |
| macOS (Intel) | `AlphaDesk_*_x64.dmg` |
| Windows | `.msi` or `.exe` setup |
| Linux | `.AppImage` or `.deb` |

See [README](https://github.com/baoge-bit/smartdesk#quick-start) for setup.

### Highlights

- AI decision dashboard with K-line charts
- 15+ agent strategy chat with session history
- Historical reports, compare view, and re-analyze
- Backtest, portfolio, and decision signals
- Schema-driven settings with connectivity tests
- Desktop auto-update (signed builds)

### Engine

Bundled Python sidecar based on [daily_stock_analysis](https://github.com/ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis). Configure LLM via Ollama or cloud API in Settings.

### Checksum

Verify downloads using the `.sig` files attached to this release (Tauri updater).
